name: Zoho Books API
what_it_does: Zoho Books REST API for cloud accounting and bookkeeping platform. Enables AI agents to create and manage invoices, track expenses, query financial reports, manage contacts and vendors, handle payments, and integrate accounting data into finance workflows. Zoho Books is part of the Zoho ecosystem and integrates natively with Zoho CRM and other Zoho apps.
use_cases: Creating and sending invoices from billing automation agents
Tracking expenses and bills from financial operations agents
Querying financial reports and P&L data from finance analytics agents
Integrating Zoho Books data into CRM and order management workflow agents
best_when: A small or mid-size business using Zoho Books wants AI agents to automate invoicing, expense tracking, and financial reporting, especially within the broader Zoho ecosystem.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Financial data manipulation errors can cause accounting discrepancies, incorrect tax filings, and compliance issues. Test thoroughly in sandbox.

auth.notes: Zoho Books uses Zoho OAuth 2.0 with org-scoped tokens. Access tokens expire after 1 hour; refresh tokens valid for 90 days. Scopes include ZohoBooks.fullaccess.all and granular read/write scopes.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: 1 user, 1000 invoices/year, 5 automated workflows
pricing.paid_tiers: Standard, Professional, Premium, Elite, and Ultimate plans scaling users, invoices, and features
pricing.notes: Competitive SMB accounting pricing. API access included on all plans including free.

performance.rate_limits: 100 API requests per minute per organization

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Incorrect invoices, payments, or journal entries cause real accounting errors
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API integration required
OAuth tokens expire in 1 hour — implement refresh token rotation for long-running agents
Organization ID (org_id) required on all API calls as query parameter
Rate limit of 100 req/min per org — batch operations carefully
Multi-currency and multi-timezone support may affect date/amount handling
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Full access to financial records. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 with granular scopes. Zoho ecosystem — India-headquartered company with global data centers.

security_score_components.security_notes: Full financial data access. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 with granular scopes. Multi-region data residency.
